zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph le Boteler於大約1394年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒時，他的父親Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeley41歲，母親Alice de Beauchamp29歲。他於大約1418年與Lady Elizabeth Norbury在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1473年5月2日在他的家鄉享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph le Boteler于大约1394年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒时，他的父亲Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeley41岁，母亲Alice de Beauchamp29岁。他于大约1418年与Lady Elizabeth Norbury在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1473年5月2日在他的家乡享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph le Boteler was born about 1394, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeley, was 41 and his mother, Alice de Beauchamp, was 29. He married Lady Elizabeth Norbury about 1418, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 2 May 1473, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph le Boteler est né environ 1394, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeley, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice de Beauchamp, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Norbury environ 1418, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1473, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph le Boteler um 1394 in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeley 41 und seine Mutter Alice de Beauchamp 29. Er hat um 1418 in England Lady Elizabeth Norbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Mai 1473 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph le Boteler è nato il circa 1394 nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeley, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Beauchamp, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Norbury circa 1418, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1473, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph le Botelerが約1394年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーで生まれた時，父Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeleyは41歳，母Alice de Beauchampは29歳であった。約1418年にイギリスでLady Elizabeth Norburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1473年5月2日に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph le Boteler(이)가 대략 1394년 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeley(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Beauchamp(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1418년 영국에서 Lady Elizabeth Norbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1473년 5월 2일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph le Boteler nasceu aproximadamente 1394, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeley, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Beauchamp, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Norbury aproximadamente 1418, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1473, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph le Boteler родился около 1394 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas le Boteler 4th Baron Sudeley было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Beauchamp, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Norbury около 1418 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 мая 1473 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.

Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Norbury aproximadamente 1418, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1473, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años.
